diagrams.name: connector_startup_initialization
diagrams.title: Connector Startup and Initialization Flow
diagrams.description: How a Debezium connector boots: config validation, task creation, JDBC connection setup, and offset loading

diagrams.name: initial_snapshot_flow
diagrams.title: Initial Database Snapshot Flow
diagrams.description: Full table snapshot: lock acquisition, table scanning, change event emission, and snapshot completion
diagrams.scope: Snapshot module — initial full table read

diagrams.name: binlog_streaming_flow
diagrams.title: MySQL/MariaDB Binlog Streaming Flow
diagrams.description: Ongoing CDC via binlog: client connection, event reading, DML event handling, and offset commit

diagrams.name: binlog_change_event_emission
diagrams.title: Binlog Change Record Emission
diagrams.description: Converting raw binlog events to Debezium change records: row extraction, type conversion, and struct building

diagrams.name: incremental_snapshot_flow
diagrams.title: Incremental Snapshot Flow
diagrams.description: Non-blocking incremental snapshot: watermark management, chunk reading, and deduplication with streaming events

diagrams.name: oracle_logminer_streaming
diagrams.title: Oracle LogMiner Streaming Flow
diagrams.description: LogMiner session lifecycle: mining window setup, SQL query execution, event parsing, and SCN advancement

diagrams.name: oracle_connector_snapshot_stream
diagrams.title: Oracle Connector Snapshot and Stream Transition
diagrams.description: Oracle full snapshot, SCN watermark establishment, and handoff to LogMiner streaming

diagrams.name: postgres_wal_streaming
diagrams.title: PostgreSQL WAL Streaming Flow
diagrams.description: WAL replication slot creation, logical decoding plugin interaction, change event production, and LSN commit

diagrams.name: postgres_type_handling
diagrams.title: PostgreSQL Type Conversion Flow
diagrams.description: Complex PostgreSQL type metadata resolution, numeric/hstore/array conversion, and schema building

diagrams.name: mongodb_change_stream_flow
diagrams.title: MongoDB Change Stream CDC Flow
diagrams.description: MongoDB change stream open, event document processing, oplog-based capture, and resume token management

diagrams.name: sqlserver_cdc_flow
diagrams.title: SQL Server CDC Capture Flow
diagrams.description: SQL Server CDC table scanning, LSN range queries, change table polling, and transaction batch assembly
diagrams.scope: SQL Server connector — CDC polling loop

diagrams.name: jdbc_sink_connector_flow
diagrams.title: JDBC Sink Connector Write Flow
diagrams.description: Sink connector receiving change events, upsert/delete mode selection, prepared statement execution, and batch commit

diagrams.name: schema_change_handling
diagrams.title: Schema Change (DDL) Handling Flow
diagrams.description: DDL event detection, Antlr parser invocation, schema registry update, and downstream schema change event emission

diagrams.name: mysql_ddl_parsing_flow
diagrams.title: MySQL DDL Parsing Flow
diagrams.description: MySQL DDL statement tokenization, Antlr grammar parsing, AST traversal, and table metadata update

diagrams.name: smt_transformation_pipeline
diagrams.title: Single Message Transform (SMT) Pipeline
diagrams.description: Change event flowing through the SMT chain: filter evaluation, field transformation, and record routing

diagrams.name: event_queue_and_dispatch
diagrams.title: Change Event Queue and Dispatch Flow
diagrams.description: Producer enqueueing change events, queue backpressure, consumer dequeuing, and dispatcher forwarding to Kafka

diagrams.name: offset_management_flow
diagrams.title: Offset Management and Persistence Flow
diagrams.description: Offset context updates after each event, periodic flush to Kafka Connect offset storage, and recovery on restart

diagrams.name: heartbeat_signal_flow
diagrams.title: Heartbeat and Signal Channel Flow
diagrams.description: Heartbeat interval trigger, heartbeat record emission, signal table polling, and action dispatch

diagrams.name: streaming_metrics_collection
diagrams.title: Streaming Metrics Collection Flow
diagrams.description: Per-event metrics updates (lag, throughput, SCN), JMX MBean registration, and metric exposure

diagrams.name: embedded_engine_execution
diagrams.title: Embedded Engine Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Embedded Debezium engine startup, connector task loop, record polling, and consumer callback invocation

diagrams.name: jdbc_connection_lifecycle
diagrams.title: JDBC Connection Lifecycle Flow
diagrams.description: Connection pool acquisition, query execution with CancellableResultSet, transaction control, and connection release

diagrams.name: connector_config_validation
diagrams.title: Connector Configuration Validation Flow
diagrams.description: Config field definition, validation chain execution, error accumulation, and connector rejection or acceptance

diagrams.name: redis_storage_flow
diagrams.title: Redis Offset/Schema Storage Flow
diagrams.description: Redis connection setup, offset record serialization, write with retry, and read-back for connector resume

diagrams.name: gtid_based_recovery_flow
diagrams.title: GTID-Based Binlog Recovery Flow
diagrams.description: GTID mode detection, GTID set reconstruction from offset, binlog position recovery, and streaming resume

diagrams.name: geometry_type_handling
diagrams.title: Geometry and Special Type Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Geometry column decoding, WKB/WKT conversion, and unsigned integer promotion in binlog events
